sections.paragraph:
m. ־ִית, f. adj.-

(1) in front, anterior, Eze 10:19 11:1 hence-

(2) oriental, eastern. הַיָּם הַקַּדְמֹנִי the eastern sea, i.e. the Dead Sea, opp. to the western, i.e. Mediterranean, Eze 47:18 Joe 2:20.

(3) old, ancient, Eze 38:17. Pl. קַדְמֹנִים the elder (amongst contemporaries), Job 18:20. Sing. collect. 1Sa 24:14, מְשַׁל הַקַּדְמֹנִי “the proverb of the ancients.” Pl. f. קַדְמֹנִיֹּות ancient, former, past things, Isa 43:18.

(4) [Kadmonites], pr.n. of a Canaanitish nation, Gen 15:19.
